allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json, sys; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"total: {d.get\('total'\)}\\"\); print\(f\\"first title: {d['stories'][0]['title'] if d.get\('stories'\) else '\(none\)'}\\"\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"count: {d['count']}\\"\); print\(f\\"first 3: {[r['code'] for r in d['regions'][:3]]}\\"\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('community-tier key created:', d.get\('api_key_prefix','...'\) if 'api_key' in d else d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('signup keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'access_levels: {d.get\(\\"access_levels\\"\)}'\); print\(f'tier: {\\"unlimited\\" if d.get\(\\"rate_limit_per_min\\"\)==0 else \\"basic\\"}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('countries:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('total subdivisions:', sum\(len\(v\) for v in d.values\(\)\)\)")
